import sys


def load_plugin(plugin_name: str) -> object:
    plugin_path = f"/opt/plugins/{plugin_name}"
    if plugin_path not in sys.path:
        sys.path.insert(0, plugin_path)
    mod = __import__(plugin_name)
    return mod


def load_extension(ext_name: str) -> object:
    ext_dir = f"/opt/extensions/{ext_name}"
    sys.path.append(ext_dir)
    mod = __import__(ext_name)
    return mod


def ensure_vendor_deps():
    vendor_path = "/opt/vendor/lib"
    if vendor_path not in sys.path:
        sys.path.insert(0, vendor_path)
